things.name: Burgas Lakes
things.description: Four interconnected lakes - a Ramsar wetland site with flamingos and rare bird species

things.name: Sea Garden (Morska Gradina)
things.description: Beautiful park along the coast with aquarium, open-air theatre and beach access

things.name: Nesebar Old Town
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage ancient city on a peninsula with Byzantine churches

things.name: Sozopol
things.description: Charming Black Sea resort town with wooden houses and ancient Apollonia heritage

things.name: Burgas Archaeological Museum
things.description: Fine collection of Thracian and Greek artefacts from the region

things.name: Burgas Art Gallery
things.description: Regional art gallery with Bulgarian paintings from the 19th century onwards

things.name: St Anastasia Island
things.description: Small Black Sea island with a monastery, lighthouse and summer restaurant

things.name: Ethnographic Museum
things.description: Traditional Bulgarian crafts and costumes in a 19th-century house

things.name: Pomorie Salt Museum
things.description: Unique open-air museum at Europe's oldest working salt pans

things.name: Primorsko Beach
things.description: Pristine sandy beach at a nature reserve south of Burgas
